preconditions: the attribute name must exist in the object
postconditions: the named attribute is deleted from the object
AttributeError is raised if the attribute does not exist
edge_cases: deleting a built-in attribute may raise a TypeError
deleting an attribute that does not exist raises an AttributeError
deleting an attribute from an object that does not support attribute deletion raises a TypeError

preconditions: name must be a valid attribute name
postconditions: the named attribute is deleted from the object
edge_cases: if the object is None, raise AttributeError
if the name is None, raise TypeError
if the name is not a string, raise TypeError
if the object does not have the attribute, raise AttributeError

agreed.groq: the attribute name must exist in the object
agreed.hf: name must be a valid attribute name

agreed.groq: the named attribute is deleted from the object
agreed.hf: the named attribute is deleted from the object

groq_only: AttributeError is raised if the attribute does not exist
deleting a built-in attribute may raise a TypeError
deleting an attribute that does not exist raises an AttributeError
deleting an attribute from an object that does not support attribute deletion raises a TypeError
hf_only: if the object is None, raise AttributeError
if the name is None, raise TypeError
if the name is not a string, raise TypeError
if the object does not have the attribute, raise AttributeError
